title: Bridge Essay: Interoceptive Inception in Insula.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.

**Interoceptive Inception in Insula.**. Neuron.. PMID: 32191858. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2020.02.032. The neural mechanisms underlying interoception-the sensation of internal physiological states-remain largely unresolved. In this issue of Neuron, Livneh et al. demonstrate that the insula bridges different timescales of interoception by tracking and predicting thirst and hunger states.
